title: Non-polio enterovirus infections - Canada.ca
content:
## Non-polio enterovirus infections
Learn about non-polio enterovirus infections, their causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the causes of non-polio enterovirus infections, how they are spread and where they are found.
Learn about the symptoms, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how non-polio enterovirus infections are diagnosed and treated.
Learn how non-polio enterovirus infections can be prevented.
Discover how non-polio enterovirus infections are monitored.

### For health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
